title: Command & Conquer
edition_pinned: Command & Conquer Remastered Collection Steam app 1213210 listing (includes remastered Tiberian Dawn), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1995 Command & Conquer design.
moat: Tiberium harvest rates fund base expansion while unit counters and map control decide mission outcomes.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One build-queue and counter roster recombines across authored missions and multiplayer maps.
exemplar_rationale: Defines Westwood real-time strategy roots: harvest, base, and army pressure in shared time.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 34790 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for Command & Conquer Remastered Collection.
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Strategy.
